arts.ttl: Nathan Jones' revealing Stoke City comment as he returns to scene of 'defeat that cost him his job'
arts.sum: Jones was one month away from the end of his time as Stoke manager when he lost a League Cup tie at League Two Crawley in September 2019. He moved back to Luton in time, then on to Southampton in the Premier League before joining Charlton in League One, where he as guided them up to fourth in the table thanks to a 2-1 win at Crawley, a performance that was the antithesis of what he saw from his Stoke side five-and-a-half years ago.

arts.ttl: Championship relegation fixtures as Stoke City boss makes league table point
arts.sum: “We’ve got to try to get through Saturday and work hard there because it’s a tough game against a former Stoke City manager who I’m sure will be wanting to win the game for that reason alone. Stoke moved back four points away from the relegation zone with a key win over Blackburn on Wednesday night in a round of fixtures when there were victories for five of the bottom seven and pressure grew on the two that didn’t, Cardiff and Oxford.

arts.ttl: Talking points from Millwall’s 2-0 loss at Leeds United - Lions can’t tame Championship leaders
arts.sum: Millwall’s chances of sneaking into the Championship play-offs were dented on Wednesday evening as they suffered a 2-0 defeat at Leeds United. The change of George Honeyman for Billy Mitchell after the ex-Sunderland attacker went down with a groin injury after 28 minutes saw Neil surrender an attacking player to help combat the midfield battle against Joe Rothwell, who was running the game for the hosts.

Millwall found themselves trailing against arch-rivals Leeds after just three minutes in midweek after a Jake Cooper own goal, and went on to lose 2-0 at Elland Road. Alex Neil's men have won just t...

arts.ttl: Stoke City outcast receives World Cup call-up as clubmates clash
arts.sum: Angola have played four games so far in a six-team group, drawing three and winning one. The team in second could progress to a second round of qualifying and that seems to be between Libya, Cape Verde and Angola.
